<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Status check for OTLP"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/otlp/v1/traces"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Return the OTLP endpoint liveness status.

Lightweight readiness probe. Returns `{"status": "ready"}` when
the router is mounted. Intended for health checks from OTel
collectors before they start exporting traces.

<ParamsDetails>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  {...require("./otlp-status.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  {...require("./otlp-status.StatusCodes.json")}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
